required_preferences.fact: Regularly babysits her niece on select weekday evenings after work — no longer restricts babysitting to weekends

supersedes.fact: Babysits her niece on Saturday afternoons — never on weekday evenings

required_preferences.fact: Uses her prescribed CPAP machine nightly as her primary sleep intervention — no longer takes sleep medication unless specifically directed by her sleep specialist

supersedes.fact: Strictly takes prescribed sleep medication at bedtime as her main sleep aid; no longer relies on calming music or pre-bed routines

required_preferences.fact: Brings calm, screen-free activities (like crocheting or reading aloud) to occupy herself and soothe her niece during weekday babysitting sessions
Schedules and prioritizes Tacoma trips around her mother's medical appointments, planning her work and personal activities to minimize stress and maximize support during the recovery period
Chooses vegetarian meal options at conference events and workshops, politely declining meat-based dishes even during formal dinners or receptions.
Adds a daily project update note to the cross-functional team workspace before logging off — avoids lengthy recap emails

persona: A junior web developer at a nonprofit organization
